homepage.title: International Student Platform
homepage.subtitle: Everything students need before, during, and after arrival

seo.metaDescription: Central hub for academics, questionnaires, resources, announcements, and support.

blocks.body:
## Welcome

Use this page to introduce your platform, highlight key services, and direct students to the most important sections.

## Academic Information

Add details about programs, credits, registration steps, exam timelines, and tutoring services.

seo.metaDescription: All questionnaires and student feedback forms.

blocks.body:
## Student Questionnaires

Manage onboarding forms, housing surveys, and feedback questionnaires from this page.

seo.metaDescription: Helpful documents and resources for international students.

blocks.body:
## Student Resources

Use this page for visa guides, health insurance information, campus maps, and downloadable forms.

seo.metaDescription: Latest institutional updates for international students.

blocks.body:
## Latest Announcements

Publish urgent updates, policy changes, and important dates that students should not miss.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.subtitle: Reach student services and support teams

seo.metaDescription: Contact details for international student support.

blocks.body:
## Contact Information

Add office email, phone number, address, opening hours, and emergency contact instructions.

## Spatiantia astra 

Foeda, medio silva *errandum*: onus formam munere. Mutata bibulis est auxiliare arces etiamnunc verbis virgineo Priamidas illa Thescelus, nam fit locis lucis auras. Exitus hospes gratulor ut pondere [speslimite](http://www.curas.io/figuram); quid habent, Avernales faciente de. Non color esset potest non sumit, sed vix arserat. Nisi immo silva tantum pectusque quos pennis quisquam artus!
